query: Was the international technology framework adopted at the June 2026 summit?

documents.title: Technology Framework Adopted at Summit
documents.text: The international technology framework was adopted at the June 2026 summit by delegates from 30 countries, marking a new era of policy coordination.

documents.title: Framework Vote Results Published
documents.text: The international technology framework was adopted at the June 2026 summit. Official records confirm the majority vote result and the adoption enters into effect immediately.

claims: The international technology framework was adopted at the June 2026 summit
